files.content:
Product Name

This card element can be used to display a product, post, or any other type of data.

visual_summary: A card component with a rounded shape, showcasing an image and containing a title, description, and a 'View Product' button. It is commonly used to display product, post, or other data type details.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics: Name: card Description: A card component with a rounded shape, showcasing an image and containing a title, description, and a 'View Product' button. It is commonly used to display product, post, or other data type details. Style: rounded, shadow Interactions: Tags: card, image, button, text, container Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // elements/card.html

Product Name
